_comment: Image variant definitions for bazzite-nix builds

variants.name: string
variants.tags_default: If 'tags' is omitted, generates: [base_image_tag, base_image_tag-canonical, canonical]

_schema._output: Fields computed by check-variants.sh for each variant needing a build:

output_fields.build_script: string - the build script to use
output_fields.parent_version: string - version label from upstream base image
output_fields.digest: string - SHA256 digest of upstream base image (without sha256: prefix)
output_fields.canonical_tag: string - computed canonical version tag (with collision handling)
output_fields.tags: string - comma-separated list of tags to apply
output_fields.prev_ref: string - full image ref of previous build for rechunk (may be empty)
output_fields.needs_build: boolean - whether this variant needs rebuilding
